query:
SELECT 
            i.amount, 
            i.commission, 
            p.title as property_title, 
            ''::TEXT as owner_name 
        FROM invoices i
        JOIN contracts ct ON i.contract_id = ct.id
        JOIN properties p ON ct.property_id = p.id
        WHERE i.tenant_id = $1 AND i.status = 'PAID'
